name: GetPaymentMethod
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific payment method by its ID. Returns 404 if the method is not available on the profile, or 403 if it's available but not yet enabled.

profile_id.description: The profile ID for organization-level credentials.

method_id.description: The payment method identifier (e.g., 'ideal', 'creditcard', 'applepay'). For wallet methods like Apple Pay, use 'applepay' as the ID.

locale.description: The locale for the method names (e.g., 'en_US', 'nl_NL'). This affects the language of the description field and preferred order.

currency.description: Currency code for converting minimumAmount and maximumAmount (e.g., 'EUR', 'USD').

include.description: Include additional data. Use 'issuers' to include available issuers (e.g., for iDEAL banks).

sequence_type.description: The sequence type for recurring payments. Use 'oneoff' for one-off payments, 'first' for the first payment in a recurring sequence, or 'recurring' for subsequent recurring payments.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to true to retrieve test mode method information, or omit for live mode.
